scope.target: Define English, Traditional Chinese Taiwan, and bilingual documentation rules.
constraints: Agent-facing execution context should be English.
Human-facing requirement and guide text may use Traditional Chinese Taiwan wording.
Bilingual files are reserved for entry points.
non_goals: Do not translate every existing document.

inputs.architecture_target: Low-token agent context and maintainable human-readable docs.
user_constraints: .ai, .agents, .claude, .dev/specs, .dev/standards, and index files should be English by default.
.dev/requirement may use Traditional Chinese Taiwan wording.
README and AGENTS entry files may have bilingual variants.

steps: Define when bilingual variants are allowed.
Avoid requiring translations for every file.
validation: Check that policy resolves .dev/specs path naming correctly.
deferred_items: Translation migration is a future workflow unless explicitly requested.

results.summary: Added AI context language policy with English defaults for agent-facing context and zh-TW allowance for human-facing project truth.
